title: Thank You Issue
author: greggman
body:
I hope you don't consider this spam and I hope maybe you'll consider pinning this issue so other people can add their thanks but I just wanted to say,  I've been using this library for a couple of projects and I'd be dead without it so ....

# Thank you so much for all the work all of the contributors have put into this! ❤

Also, I know that donations bring their own set of problems but if you took donations I'd happily donate with no expectations.

comments.author: tukutela
comments.body: I've been using it in production for years, very thankful.....
